description: CompositionBlack top made of 100% viscose rayon, with a boat neck, dolman sleeves, ribbed hemline, and graphic and glitter print on the right chest and sleeveFittingComfortWash care Hand wash cold Wash dark colours separately Use mild detergent Do not bleach Do not wring or tumble dry Flat dry in shade Warm iron Do not iron on print/embellishments With a subtle silky appearance, this top from lee is all set to silhouette you perfectly, giving you that glamorous edge. The graphic running along the right sleeve enhances the style quotient of this tee, while the ribbed hem makes it Fit well along the lower waist. Team it with jeans and sleek sandals for that stylish edge.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirts Height-5.7", Chest-33", Waist-26"
